value.found_quote: Utilizing Agent Platform Sessions and an Agent Platform Memory Bank to maintain the state of continuous conversations and retrieve persistent, long-term memories, enabling highly personalized and natural user interactions.
value.rationale: The page clearly describes Google's Memory Bank as a managed service under the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform (on Vertex AI) that stores and retrieves persistent, long-term user preferences and facts as memories that agents can read and write across sessions. The page explicitly states it is in "Preview" and "subject to the 'Pre-GA Offerings Terms'". Multiple sections reference Memory Bank, including an overview, setup guide, API quickstart, ADK quickstart, and guides for generating memories, ingesting events, fetching memories, and memory profiles — all consistent with the claim's description of a managed service for persistent, long-term user preferences and facts across sessions.
